title: How Voetzorg Roermond transformed their booking experience
excerpt: Voetzorg Roermond transformed their booking experience with Salonora — less admin, more online appointments, and a smoother client journey.
yoast_title: How Voetzorg Roermond transformed their booking experience - Salonora
yoast_metadesc: Discover how Voetzorg Roermond transformed their booking experience with Salonora: 42% cost savings, 2-month payback, and 85% more bookings.
